The Mission

The fastest way to shift reality
is to change the code that's generating it.

Every decision your brain makes is filtered through what it believes to be true about the identity it is programmed to express. Everything you experience: the love you let in, the money you can receive or levels of recognition you can handle are determined by how much expansion your nervous system can hold before it registers threat. This means that your capacity is a biological constraint based on a set of beliefs encoded in your mind — and I am equipped with the perfect tools to help you rewrite the rules of this programming.

My work goes directly to the root of where these beliefs are stored within the depths of your internal operating system. Through RTT™ hypnotherapy, nervous system regulation, and deep identity transformation, we access the subconscious layer where your original programming was encoded and rewrite it at its source. The results help you shift into the most liberated, empowered, abundant and joyous version of yourself that can possibly exist.

Begin the Work
"For one who has conquered the mind, the mind is the best of friends; but for one who has failed to do so, their mind will remain the greatest enemy." — Bhagavad Gita 6.6

About Isis

A life devoted
fully to the path

My name is Isis Anchalee (yes, I was named this at birth). How to reduce a lifetime of transformation into a few simple paragraphs?

My journey has been extremely unconventional — In 2013 after my first trip to India to study yoga I came back, taught myself to code, and became an (extremely) successful software engineer in San Francisco. Then, as life happens, my entire world shifted in 2018 when intense grief triggered a cataclysmic spiritual awakening, which lead me to walk away from that version of my life to pursue a path of complete spiritual dedication.

I have since become a forever student of Eastern non-dual wisdom traditions, certified RTT™ hypnotherapist, 1000+ hour RYT yoga teacher, Vedic astrologer, and built my own ethical fashion company. At this point I have spent a full decade+ of my life in complete devotion to my spiritual path — have studied with some of the most advanced spiritual masters on the planet and have accumulated 6,000+ hours of meditation & study with over 130+ days spent in meditation retreat/dieta.

Inside me I feel an insatiable desire understand the nature of reality — how perception originates, how energy moves through the universe, what is "liberation" and how do we learn to master the rules of the game of life to truly "win"?

The answers to these questions I have found at the intersection of ancient Eastern philosophy and modern neuroscience — and they form the foundation for everything I do. My life is a living testament to the power of these modalities. Time & time again I have been able to utilize whatever life gives me in service of my highest evolution, and now I have reverse-engineered it into a repeatable framework to support your most-empowered expression as well.

“

After an excruciating breakup that repeated a very painful cycle for me, I received a tailored hypnotherapy track from Isis to work on healing my relationship to men and open a new possibility of relating. Within a short time I met a wonderful man and I've never had a better dating experience in my life. I've never experienced so much generosity, care, thoughtfulness and chivalry before and I'm certain it has a lot to do with shifting my beliefs around what was possible. Isis helped me get here and I'm so grateful!

Halo  ·  Spiritual Teacher

What I Offer

Three paths to
transformation

Each offering is crafted to support your greatest expansion.

01

1:1 RTT™ Hypnotherapy
Sessions

A 2-hour live hypnotherapy session that is designed to directly target and resolve the subconscious root of whatever issue you're experiencing. You walk away with a 15 minute hypnosis audio tailored to your specific requests to help integrate the transformation. Be prepared to go DEEP.

$350–$650 / sliding scale

Book Now

02

Identity Shift
1:1 Mentorship

This is a journey of profound transformation. You get my brain and expertise with a variety of tools shining a light directly into your mind. We integrate your blind spots, clear outdated programming and reprogram your mind to embody the most liberated, empowered & radiant version of yourself.

Apply Here

03

Hypnosis
Audio Library

Studio-recorded hypnosis audios over professional-grade theta binaural beats designed to support upgrading your reality on your own time. From confidence to abundance to calling in partnership — they are miraculously simple and INCREDIBLY effective. I listen to them every day (they are seriously one of my favorite life hacks!).

$33 / single audio
